title: Venue Result
description: Shared schema that all specialist agents return. Contains a list of venue candidates and agent observations.

agent.description: Name of the specialist agent that produced these results

match_score.description: How well this venue matches user preferences (0-1)

match_reason.description: Why this venue is a good match for the user's preferences

best_time.description: Best time of day to visit: morning, midday, afternoon, evening

nearby_pairing.description: A nearby venue that pairs well with this one

estimated_duration_min.description: Estimated time to spend here in minutes

source_url.description: Official website URL for the venue

image_url.description: Representative photo of the venue exterior or interior

google_maps_url.description: Generated by coordinator at format time, not by agents

event_dates.description: Schedule for time-sensitive venues (markets, events). e.g. 'Every Saturday 9am-2pm', 'Feb 15-16 only'

observations.description: High-level observations about this category in the city
